top_signals.title: France’s Moulin Says ECB Must Be Ready to Act With Eye on Growth
top_signals.summary: Emmanuel Macron’s nominee to run the Bank of France said the European Central Bank must be ready to tighten monetary policy as inflation pressure rises, though he stressed that officials should also consider how their actions affect economic expansion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: This bitcoin bear market is different with 'uniquely pessimistic' traders limiting downside, K33 says
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
